section_miscategorizations.text: Order an echocardiogram to assess cardiac function.
section_miscategorizations.reason: An echocardiogram result is already documented in Findings (reduced EF 45% and mitral regurgitation). Placing a new order for an echocardiogram in the Plan after results are reported is internally inconsistent and could mislead a reader about the timing/status of the study.
This is a documentation workflow comment, not a clinical plan item. It does not belong in any clinical section but is unlikely to mislead about patient care.
